final_prompt.prompt:
Create a full-screen brand marketing poster for OPPO, showcasing the new OPPO Find X9 Pro smartphone, designed as a mobile screen publication ad with maximum visual impact.

Style/medium: photorealistic product poster, sleek and bold editorial style, inspired by Apple and Samsung launch campaign aesthetics
Composition: vertical 9:16 full-bleed layout, hero product centered in lower two-thirds, brand name and model name anchored in upper third, generous negative space for visual breathing room
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Pro smartphone, pristine and gleaming, displayed at a slight dynamic angle to reveal the camera module and edge-to-edge display
Scene/backdrop: deep black or ultra-dark gradient background with subtle volumetric light rays emanating from behind the device
Lighting/mood: dramatic single-source spotlight from above, cool blue-white rim light on device edges, high-contrast and commanding — visual impact first
Color palette: deep black as dominant base, OPPO brand red as accent, cool silver-white highlights on device surface
Materials/textures: mirror-finish glass back panel, polished metal frame with visible chamfer, subtle lens flare on camera ring
Text (verbatim): "OPPO" "Find X9 Pro"
Constraints: text must be legible at 1080×1920 mobile resolution; brand name "OPPO" must be the largest typographic element; no UI chrome or status bar overlay
Avoid: cluttered background, lens distortion artifacts, generic tech-blog watermarks, over-saturated rainbow gradients, blurry device edges
